data.title: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) to release Q1 earnings on 2026-01-20, expected EPS of $1.19. Investors eagerly await results.
data.description: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, January 20, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.19 for the report. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is important for new investors to understand the significance of guidance in assessing a company's performance and future prospects. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Anduril partners with Dirac for AI work instructions in factories in a multi-year deal. New York, Jan 19, 2026.
data.description: Dirac's BuildOS has been chosen by Anduril as a key manufacturing infrastructure partner for AI-driven work instruction authoring in a multi-year agreement. This partnership signifies a significant move for Anduril as they integrate Dirac's expertise into their manufacturing operations. The collaboration is set to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in Anduril's processes. The agreement between the two companies was finalized on January 19, 2026, in New York, marking the beginning of a strategic alliance that aims to optimize operations and drive innovation.

data.title: Kaizen Analytix acquires Nihon to enhance SAP, IT, and Cybersecurity services, expanding presence in Japan & India.
data.description: SAP's capabilities, IT infrastructure services, and cybersecurity strength are bolstered by the recent acquisition, which also enhances Kaizen's reach in Japan. Moreover, a reputable offshore delivery center in India has been gained through this transaction. The deal was finalized on January 19, 2026, spanning across Atlanta, Tokyo, and Chennai, India.

data.title: NYSE creates 24/7 blockchain exchange for tokenized stocks, ETFs pending regulatory approval, ushering careful move to onchain trading.
data.description: The platform is currently awaiting regulatory approval and would signify a tentative move towards on-chain markets.

data.title: Alphamin reports record FY2025 tin production, FY2026 guidance, and senior management changes in Mauritius - Globe Newswire.
data.description: Alphamin Resources Corp., based in Grand Baie, Mauritius, released an update on Jan. 19, 2026, for the year and quarter ending on Dec. 31, 2025. The company, listed as AFM:TSXV and APH:JSE AltX, shared positive news about its operations during this period.

data.title: Infinix launches NOTE Edge with 3D curved-screen for premium users. Released in HONG KONG on Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 19, 2026, Infinix introduced the NOTE Edge smartphone, featuring a unique 3D curved-screen design tailored for users seeking both top-notch visuals and extensive functionality. This device, positioned as the newest member of the Infinix lineup, aims to cater to individuals who prioritize premium aesthetics and high performance.

data.title: Poolwerx expands to Riverside, CA with new franchise owners Donald and Phyllis. Largest global pool service brand.
data.description: A well-known franchise specializing in pool, hot tub, and spa services, Poolwerx, has expanded its reach to a new territory as part of its nationwide growth strategy. The franchise, which is recognized as the largest global brand in its sector, is currently focusing on expanding its operations. The latest development involves Franchise Owners Donald and Phyllis who have taken on the responsibility of managing the new territory. This move aligns with Poolwerx's ambitious goals for growth and strategic expansion across the country.

data.title: Area 15 Ventures and Port of Subs® announce leadership changes, including Adam Contos, Dave Liniger, and Healey Mendicino.
data.description: Three prominent figures in the industry, Adam Contos, Dave Liniger, and Healey Mendicino, are stepping into new roles within Area 15 Ventures, a franchise growth engine. The leadership transitions were disclosed on Jan. 19, 2026. These changes signal a significant shift towards growth across both organizations under their guidance. This move marks a new era for Area 15 Ventures as it looks to capitalize on opportunities.

data.title: Wahed launches new UCITS ETFs integrating Shariah compliance and ethical values, catering to human rights, injustice.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, Wahed, a top Islamic fintech and investment manager, unveiled a pioneering range of UCITS equity ETFs blending Shariah compliance with a discretionary review system influenced by Islamic principles. This launch marks a significant advancement in the financial sector.

data.title: Micron Technology invests $1.8 billion in Taiwanese chip fab to enhance DRAM production for AI-driven demand.
data.description: Micron Technology has announced its plan to purchase a chip fabrication site in Taiwan for $1.8 billion in response to the rapidly increasing demand for DRAM memory due to advancements in artificial intelligence technology. This acquisition aims to enhance Micron's production capacity for DRAM memory chips.
